scripts.validate:editions: npm run generate:interpretations && npm run generate:enhancement-plans && node scripts/validate-editions.mjs
scripts.test:ux: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.ux.config.ts
scripts.test:ux:media: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.ux.config.ts tests/ux/source-window-media-audit.spec.ts
scripts.qa:source-windows: npm run validate:editions && npm test && npm run test:ux:media
scripts.qa:publish: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate && npm run audit:codebase && npm run validate:editions && npm test && npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.ux.config.ts tests/ux/generated-edition-smoke.spec.ts tests/ux/source-window-media-audit.spec.ts
scripts.test:ux:update: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.ux.config.ts tests/ux/stage-windows.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:ux:a11y: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.ux.config.ts tests/ux/accessibility.spec.ts
scripts.video:demo: npm run video:demo:capture && npm run video:demo:build
